name: TAT OPSX OpenSpec
description: OpenSpec workflow skills generated from tobias-agent-toolkit core.

skills.name: tat-opsx-apply
skills.description: Implement pending tasks from an active OpenSpec change and mark tasks complete as work is finished.

skills.name: tat-opsx-archive
skills.description: Archive a completed OpenSpec change after checking artifact and task completion.

skills.name: tat-opsx-explore
skills.description: Enter explore mode to investigate code, clarify requirements, and think through options before or during an OpenSpec change.

skills.name: tat-opsx-propose
skills.description: Create an OpenSpec change with proposal, design, specs, and tasks until it is ready for implementation.

skills.name: tat-opsx-review-spec
skills.description: Verify that an implemented OpenSpec change matches its approved spec before archive, flagging drift between code and delta specs.
